situation: Updating credit performance PPTX charts with new data
lesson: PowerPoint chart updates require modifying BOTH the chart XML cache AND the embedded Excel workbook blob. The XML cache (multiLvlStrCache/numCache) is ignored on open - PowerPoint re-reads from the embedded xlsx. Also: (1) noMultiLvlLbl val=1 on catAx forces integer axis labels - must set to 0; (2) TableStyleMedium9 in table1.xml overrides chart series spPr colors - use bare tableStyleInfo with no name attribute; (3) multiLvlStrRef must be converted to strRef for reliable string axis labels.
